task_updates.executor_notes: Added `gpu_orchestrator/control/capacity_actions.py` with `CapacityActionExecutor` for concrete authoritative spawn, cancel-pending-spawn, and terminate-idle side effects. Spawn now creates the worker row before RunPod launch with `capacity_intent_id`, `capacity_action_ordinal`, normalized `spawn_reason_route_key`, action type/reason, and pool metadata, then updates RunPod status/details; spawn failures mark the worker terminal with capacity metadata. `CancelPendingSpawn` attempts RunPod termination when a `runpod_id` exists but always marks the worker row `terminated` with capacity metadata and termination-attempt outcome, so failed RunPod termination does not abort terminal marking. Idle termination preserves the stricter existing behavior by requiring RunPod termination success before marking the active worker terminal. Added `apply_reconciliation_counters_to_summary()` to fold spawned, cancelled-pending, terminated-idle, and error counters into `CycleSummary`. Existing reconciler idempotency still skips spawn actions already represented by worker metadata via `get_worker_by_capacity_action`. Added `tests/gpu_orchestrator/control/test_capacity_actions.py` covering pre-launch metadata tagging, spawn failure terminal marking, cancel terminal marking despite RunPod termination failure, idle termination failure behavior, and summary counter folding. Verification passed for the new test file, full `tests/gpu_orchestrator/control`, database/migration helper tests, and py_compile. Full suite was run and failed only at the already observed missing `scripts.spot_instance_lifetime_test` import, unrelated to T6.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. Spawn side effects are idempotent at the reconciler boundary through existing `capacity_intent_id` plus action ordinal lookup, and the concrete executor tags worker rows with capacity metadata before RunPod launch. Cancel-pending-spawn attempts RunPod termination when possible but always marks the worker terminal with capacity metadata and termination-attempt outcome, even when RunPod termination fails. Terminate-idle records capacity metadata after successful RunPod termination. Reconciler counters now have a `CycleSummary` folding helper and focused tests cover the metadata and counter paths.
